title: Booklist
text: Look for Amy Daws’s next Mountain Man Matchmaker novel SEVEN YEAR ITCH available soon from Canary Street Press. Also by Amy Daws Wait With Me series Wait With Me: A Tire Shop Rom-Com Next In Line: A Bait Shop Rom-Com One Moment Please: A Hospital Cafeteria Rom-Com Take A Number: A Bakery Rom-Com Last on the List: A Nanny Rom-Com Harris Brothers series Challenge: Camden’s Story Endurance: Tanner’s Story Keeper: Booker’s Story Surrender & Dominate: Gareth’s Duet Payback: A Harris Brothers Spin-Off Stand-Alone Blindsided: A Harris Brothers Spin-Off Stand-Alone Replay: A Harris Brothers Spin-Off Stand-Alone Sweeper: A Secret Harris Brothers Stand-Alone For additional books by Amy Daws, visit her website, amydawsauthor.com . For exclusive news on upcoming releases and updates on all your favorite characters, sign up for her newsletter at amydawsauthor.com/newsletter .
